title: Audit Finding
description: One documentation audit finding emitted by a per-skill phase (003-007) of the 008 deep-skill doc-evolution cluster.

id.description: Finding id, e.g. F-001, unique within a skill phase.

artifact_path.description: Repo-relative path to the artifact the finding is about.

severity.description: P0 blocks the gate, P1 must be fixed or deferred with approval, P2 is optional.

finding.description: What is wrong or missing, stated plainly.

evidence.description: Optional file:line or command output backing the finding.

deferred_reason.description: Required in spirit when status is deferred; the rationale for deferral.
